# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdServer
metadata:
  name: server-one
spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: TCP
      targetPort: 9000
    - port: 443
      protocol: TCP
      targetPort: 9001
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-one-authorization
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        - serviceAccount:
            name: server-one-account
          namespace: default
      to:
        - port: 9000
          protocol: TCP
      ports:
        - port: 80
          protocol: TCP
    - from:
        - serviceAccount:
            name: server-two-account
          namespace: default
      to:
        - port: 9001
          protocol: TCP
      ports:
        - port: 443
          protocol: TCP
